allow: Bash(PYTHONUTF8=1 uv run python -c "import main; print\([r.path for r in main.app.routes]\)")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess | Sort-Object -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id \\$_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host \\"Killed PID: \\$_\\" }" 2>&1)
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-Process python | Select-Object Id, CPU, MainWindowTitle | Sort-Object CPU -Descending | Select-Object -First 10" 2>&1)
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''''bio_files:'''', d.get\(''''bio_files''''\)\); print\(''''school:'''', d.get\(''''school''''\)\)")

Bash(PYTHONUTF8=1 uv run python -c "
import requests, json
NOTION_BASE = 'https://www.notion.so/api/v3'
HEADERS = {'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0'}
nametag_id = '15bc6f95-7a0f-4f1e-9d0d-cd9ef08371b0'
resp = requests.post\(f'{NOTION_BASE}/loadPageChunk', json={'pageId': nametag_id, 'limit': 100, 'cursor': {'stack': []}, 'chunkNumber': 0, 'verticalColumns': False}, headers=HEADERS, timeout=15\)
data = resp.json\(\)
blocks = data.get\('recordMap',{}\).get\('block',{}\)
for bid, bval in blocks.items\(\):
    b = bval.get\('value', {}\)
    btype = b.get\('type',''\)
    if btype in \('collection_view', 'collection_view_page', 'linked_database'\):
        print\('FOUND:', bid, btype, b.get\('view_ids'\)\)
        print\('  collection_id:', b.get\('collection_id'\)\)
" 2>&1)
